content: Tom asked Mary where her mother was.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by CK (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Tom chiese a Mary dove fosse sua madre
ita:Tom ha chiesto a Mary dove fosse sua madre
tok:jan Ton li toki tawa jan Mewi, li wile sona e ni﹕ mama meli pi meli ni li lon seme
tok:jan Ton li pana e wile sona ni tawa jan Mewi﹕ mama meli ona li lon seme﹖
